data.name: Asaya
data.detailed_description:
Asaya University – Pure NTR (Netorare) at Japan's Elite Sports Academy

You arrive at Asaya University seeking a fresh start at Japan's most prestigious sports academy. But beneath the surface of athletic excellence and competitive spirit, darker desires emerge. This is a Netorare (NTR) visual novel where relationships fracture through corruption, blackmail, and betrayal 💔. Watch helplessly as trust erodes and control slips away in this slow-burn netorare experience crafted for dedicated fans of the genre.

What Awaits You

✔ Pure Netorare, No Compromises – This is NTR without safety nets. Slow-burn corruption that tightens its grip scene by scene.

✔ The Perfect Setting for Betrayal – A sports academy where competition breeds opportunity. Where blackmail hides behind closed doors and betrayal wears a friendly face.

✔ Powerless to Stop It – Watch the psychological manipulation unfold. Feel the corruption spread as every choice leads you deeper into Netorare.

The Story

You came to Asaya University for a fresh start. Japan's most elite sports academy: a place of champions, discipline, and new beginnings. But something feels wrong.

The way she looks at you has changed. That touch lingered too long. Whispers in hallways you weren't meant to hear.

The signs are everywhere once you start seeing them.

This isn't the fresh start you imagined. This is a tale of corruption. And you're already too deep to escape.

Current Content (Prologue)

🖼️ 19+ NTR/Netorare CGs featuring corruption, blackmail, and betrayal
🖼️ 100+ Images with upscaled art and unique character designs
🎵 40+ Music Tracks & Sound Effects – Immersive audio (play with sound!)
⏱️ 10+ Minutes of storytelling
🏆 3 Exclusive CGs through hidden achievements

Coming in Future Updates

📈 Massive Content Expansion – Many more CGs including lewd scenes
👥 New Characters & Routes – More girls, deeper corruption, extended betrayal storylines
🎭 Darker Paths – Enhanced blackmail and psychological manipulation content

This is just the beginning. The real corruption is yet to come.

Solo Developer Crafted

Despite using AI art, every aspect has been carefully refined: unique character designs, extensive post-production, handwritten story, proofreading, and testing. A passion project dedicated to delivering authentic NTR for genre fans.

⚠️ Content Warning

This game contains offensive themes and is NOT suitable for everyone.

Unavoidable content: Netorare (NTR/Cuckolding), blackmail, corruption, cheating, psychological manipulation, groping, and betrayal.

This is pure NTR designed exclusively for fans who seek these controversial themes.

If Netorare, blackmail, corruption, or psychological manipulation make you uncomfortable, DO NOT purchase this game.

Is Asaya right for you?

You know what you want. Authentic NTR that respects the genre. Slow-burn netorare that builds dread and anticipation. A sports academy setting where betrayal and blackmail thrive in the shadows.

Welcome to Asaya University. Your fresh start ends here.

How deep will you go when the full story unfolds?

data.short_description: A childhood friend. A game you don't know you're playing. At Asaya University, Ren awaits: fiery, familiar, yet just out of reach. Touches aren't accidental. The women around you are part of the plan. A slow-burn NTR/Netorare visual novel where corruption unfolds whether you see it coming or not.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: 1 Ghz
  • 記憶體: 512 MB MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX or OpenGL compatible card

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6-10.14
  • 處理器: 1 Ghz
  • 記憶體: 512 MB MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX or OpenGL compatible card
  • 備註: Game is non-notarized. May not work with 10.15 Catalina

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu / SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1 Ghz
  • 記憶體: 512 MB MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX or OpenGL compatible card
